mappings.manage.user_menu.external_auth_notice: Email and password changes are not available for accounts signed in via OIDC or LDAP.

mappings.manage.authentication.auto_create_hint: Automatically create a Kener account on first OIDC/LDAP login.
mappings.manage.authentication.sync_groups_hint: Map provider groups to Kener roles on every login.
mappings.manage.authentication.oidc_groups_claim_: The JWT claim that contains the user's group list (e.g. "groups").
mappings.manage.authentication.oidc_advanced_hint: Leave all fields empty to use auto-discovery. Fill in only if your provider does not support discovery.
mappings.manage.authentication.ldap_password_hint: Leave blank to keep the existing password.
